headline: Smurfit Westrock Is Worthy Of Attention - My Favorite Long-Term Pick Right Now

headline: Avery Dennison Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Volume Gains, Cost Control
summary: AVY beats Q1 earnings estimates on strong volumes and cost control, with profits rising and cash flow swinging to positive despite mixed segment performance.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Packaging Corp of America, Raises Price Target to $232
summary: UBS  analyst Anojja Shah   maintains Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $225 to $232.
